message:
🐛 fix(ci): remove DEV_MODE from fullstack-smoke so `/` serves index.html (#7873)

`Full-Stack E2E Smoke` has been failing on every PR for this reason:

- workflow starts the Go binary with `DEV_MODE=true`
- in dev mode, `pkg/api/server.go:1224-1239` registers `GET /*` as a 307
  redirect to `FrontendURL` (Vite dev server on another port)
- Vite isn't running in this CI job — we built the frontend into
  `web/dist/` specifically so the Go binary can serve it in production mode
- Playwright's `page.goto('/')` follows the 307 to a dead port and sees
  `net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED`

That's exactly the boundary this spec exists to guard (see
`web/e2e/fullstack-smoke.spec.ts` header — "runs against the actual Go
backend binary (not the Vite dev server), so regressions that cross the
Go<->frontend boundary ... show up in CI"). DEV_MODE made it bypass that
path entirely.

Fix: don't set `DEV_MODE=true`. Without it, the server takes the
production branch (`preCompressedStatic("./web/dist")` +
`SendFile("./web/dist/index.html")`), which is what the test's three
assertions are written against. `/healthz` and `/api/version` already
pass in both modes; only `/` was affected.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,12 +67,15 @@ jobs:
       - name: Start Go backend in background
         env:
           JWT_SECRET: ${{ env.DEV_JWT_SECRET }}
-          # Dev mode — do not require real OAuth creds. The Go backend reads
-          # DEV_MODE (see cmd/console/main.go and pkg/api/server.go); the
-          # previous CONSOLE_ENV value was ignored by the binary.
-          DEV_MODE: 'true'
           PORT: ${{ env.BACKEND_PORT }}
         run: |
+          # Intentionally NOT setting DEV_MODE=true — the whole point of
+          # fullstack-smoke is to exercise the production serving path where
+          # the Go binary serves ./web/dist/index.html directly (see
+          # pkg/api/server.go:1221-1240). With DEV_MODE=true the root route
+          # 307-redirects to FrontendURL (Vite), which isn't running in CI,
+          # so the Playwright page.goto on '/' sees ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED
+          # while the /healthz + /api/version tests still pass (#6362).
           /tmp/console-binary > /tmp/console.log 2>&1 &
           echo $! > /tmp/console.pid
           echo "Backend PID: $(cat /tmp/console.pid)"
